stepBody: The message below was encoded using a Rail Fence Cipher with an unknown number of rails. Examine the structure of the ciphertext and determine how many rails were most likely used. Consider how the zig-zag arrangement would look and whether splitting the text into two or more rows could allow the message to read smoothly. TEALECCPEIALSIATPOTASOIINIHRHRIFNEIHRSCASCLYEFRNPSTOCPE
